insights.message: Low capital efficiency — ROE 3.8% (<10%) in FY2025
Thin profit margins — NPM 2.5% in FY2025
Poor cash conversion — negative CFO despite reported profit in FY2025
Negative Free Cash Flow margin -23.3% in FY2025 — heavy capex phase

anomalies.message: Net profit fell -34.1% YoY in FY2025 — significant earnings deterioration
Free cash flow has been negative for 2+ consecutive years ending FY2024 — sustained cash burn
Free cash flow has been negative for 3+ consecutive years ending FY2023 — sustained cash burn
